items.title: Mississippi health system shuts down clinics statewide after ransomware attack
items.description: The attack was launched on Thursday and prompted hospital officials to close all of its 35 clinics across the state.

items.title: Blizzard conditions and high winds forecast for NYC, East coast
items.description: The winter storm is expected to bring blizzard conditions and possibly up to 2 feet of snow in New York City.

items.title: Norway's Johannes Klæbo is new Winter Olympics king
items.description: Johannes Klaebo won all six cross-country skiing events at this year's Winter Olympics, the surpassing Eric Heiden's five golds in 1980.

items.title: Vietnam Veterans sue to block proposed 'Independence Arch' near Arlington National Cemetery
items.description: The lawsuit challenges President Trump's plans for "Independence Arch," a 250-foot structure proposed for Memorial Circle.

items.title: Trump to raise global tariffs to 15%
items.description: President Trump previously said he would implement 10% global tariffs after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down his tariff policies.
